description: Detects repeated failed sign-in attempts from external locations that may indicate credential attacks or unauthorized access attempts.
query: SigninLogs | where TimeGenerated >= ago(15m) | where ResultType != 0 | where Location !in ('Canada') | summarize FailedAttempts=count(), DistinctIPs=dcount(IPAddress), IPs=make_set(IPAddress,10) by UserPrincipalName, Location, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m) | where FailedAttempts >= 5
